---
title: "Norah Kuduk"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpeg
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/norah-kuduk
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/norah-kuduk
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Welcome! I am a data scientist with a strong background in computer science and statistics. 

As a recent graduate of St. Lawrence University, I've developed academic mentoring expertise as a Teaching Assistant and Quantitative Resource Center Mentor. In addition, I have developed my communication and work ethic working as a swim coach, lifeguard, and water safety instructor. I am currently pursuing a MSc in Data Science at the London School of Economics and Political Science, with a graduation date of September 2026. I enjoy making complex technical concepts accessible, and my passion lies at the intersection of analytics and sports. 

## Education

**The London School of Economics and Political Science** | London, UK

MSc in Data Science | Sept 2025 - Sept 2026

**St. Lawrence University** | Canton, NY, USA

BSc in Computer Science and Statistics | Aug 2021 - May 2025

## Skills

Java, Python, R, SQL, Shiny, Flutter, Docker, Data Visualization, Machine Learning


:::
